title: Item Nametags
description: Display a nametag above dropped items with the name and stack size.
body:
# ItemNameTags

A lightweight Paper plugin that displays floating nametags above all dropped items in the world, showing their name and quantity in real-time.

## Features

- Automatically adds nametags above dropped items.
- Nametags show the item’s display name (or material name) along with the current stack count (e.g., `Diamond Sword x3`).

## Installation

1. Download the latest plugin `.jar`.
2. Place it in your server's `plugins` folder.
3. Restart or reload your server.
4. Enjoy visible item nametags!
